headline: Is DLTR Stock a Buy as Earnings Rise but Risks Keep Valuation in Check
summary: DLTR's earnings momentum, valuation discount and cash flow support its setup, but traffic softness and cost pressures keep the buy case measured.

raw.headline: Is DLTR Stock a Buy as Earnings Rise but Risks Keep Valuation in Check
raw.summary: DLTR's earnings momentum, valuation discount and cash flow support its setup, but traffic softness and cost pressures keep the buy case measured.

headline: DLTR Trends Show How Value Retail Is Shifting Beyond the Dollar Store
summary: DLTR's multi-price push, delivery access and margin gains show how value retail is evolving beyond the dollar-store model despite traffic pressure.

raw.headline: DLTR Trends Show How Value Retail Is Shifting Beyond the Dollar Store
raw.summary: DLTR's multi-price push, delivery access and margin gains show how value retail is evolving beyond the dollar-store model despite traffic pressure.

headline: Dollar Tree Stock Outlook Hinges on Multi-Price and Margin Momentum
summary: DLTR's outlook rests on multi-price growth and margin gains, as stronger execution must offset softer traffic and cost pressures.
